title: Chemical disinfection dosing for flocculation/SODIS edge conditions
context: The SODIS and flocculation method-level units (content-009) explicitly excluded chemical dosing amounts. This HIGH-risk unit covers those dosing specifics: flocculant amounts for settling/flocculation and chemical dosing for SODIS edge conditions where chemical pre-treatment is recommended. Like all HIGH-risk dosing content, it is gated on the secured WASH/EH expert (partner-014) and the CI HIGH-risk gate (ci-018). Divergence between authoritative sources on dosing values must be stated, not averaged.
objective: Author, source-cite, independently numeric-verify, and WASH/EH-expert-confirm a WashUnit covering chemical disinfection dosing for: (1) coagulant/flocculant amounts in settling/flocculation and (2) chemical pre-treatment dosing for SODIS edge conditions where turbidity or conditions require it — with every numeric value tied to a specific authoritative source, independently second-checked, and confirmed by the WASH/EH expert.
acceptanceCriteria: Every dosing value (flocculant amount, concentration, SODIS chemical pre-treatment quantity) is tied to a specific named authoritative source with retrieval date and verified license

Every numeric value is independently second-checked by a person other than the author (numericClaims[].verifiedBy is distinct from the author) and confirmed by the secured WASH/EH expert (expertConfirmed:true on every numericClaim)
Where authoritative sources materially diverge on a dosing value, the divergence is explicitly stated and both sources linked; no averaging of conflicting values
A recorded expertSignOff from the secured WASH/EH professional (partner-014) is attached to this content version before merge; the sign-off is version-scoped
Unit carries a persistent 'This is general information, not a substitute for trained WASH practice' disclaimer in the rendered output; no brand or product recommendations
All source text is paraphrased — no verbatim copied text; no logos/emblems; CI copy/similarity check passes
CI HIGH-risk gate (ci-018) passes: expertSignOff present, all numericClaims have verifiedBy and expertConfirmed:true, disclaimer field present
Reviewed and approved by a WASH/public-health domain reviewer distinct from the author and the expert; PR-tied review-log entry written
output: A committed, WASH/EH-expert-signed-off, independently numeric-verified, source-cited WashUnit for chemical disinfection dosing in flocculation and SODIS edge conditions, with recorded expertSignOff and the required disclaimer.
